name: telos
description: Use $telos:goal to turn a vague intent into a concrete end state.

interface.shortDescription: Use $telos:goal to turn a vague intent into a concrete end state.
interface.longDescription: Use $telos:goal to turn a vague intent into a concrete end state.
defaultPrompt: Use $telos:goal to define success for this task.
Use $telos:goal when I know the direction but not the target.
Use $telos:goal to sharpen this vague objective.
